<div class="page__content" role="main">

<div class="container">

<div class="row">

</div>

</div>

<div class="section page__section page__first-section">

<div class="separator separator--no-scale product-page d-md-block d-lg-none">

</div>

<div id="ixlykj">

<div class="row">

<div class="col-xl-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-4">

<img src="https://developer.download.nvidia.com/images/nvidia-nsight-systems-icon-gbp-shaded-256.png" id="i3nbn" class="img-icon" alt="Nsight Compute" />

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

# NVIDIA Nsight Systems 

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

NVIDIA Nsight™ Systems is a system-wide performance analysis tool designed to visualize an application’s algorithms, identify the largest opportunities to optimize, and tune to scale efficiently across any quantity or size of CPUs and GPUs, from large servers to our smallest systems-on-a-chip (SoCs).  

<div class="separator product-page">

<div class="separator product-page">

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator product-page">

<div class="separator separator--60">

<div class="separator separator--60">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-systems/get-started" class="btn btn-cta" target="_blank">Get Started</a>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

Nsight Systems 2026.3.1 is available now.  

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

<div class="separator product-page">

</div>

<div id="in8lr">

<img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/nsight-systems-850x480.jpg" id="illvoa" alt="Nsight Systems can make high-performance games with beautiful graphics" />

</div>

<div class="separator separator--no-scale product-page">

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

Nsight Systems visualizes system workload metrics on a timeline and provides tools that help developers detect, understand, and solve performance issues.   

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

<div class="section page__section page__second-section pb-0 pt-0">

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--30">

</div>

</div>

<div id="injwlh">

<div class="row">

<div id="i838g" class="col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12 grid-col col-xl-4">

### Profile the System 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

The full picture of app optimization requires drilling deeply into hardware interactions to ensure maximum parallelism is achieved. Nsight Systems visualizes unbiased, system-wide activity data on a unified timeline, allowing application developers to investigate correlations, dependencies, activity, bottlenecks, and resource allocation to ensure hardware components are working harmoniously.   

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

<div id="ieo3pp">

<div class="row">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="io04y" class="col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12 grid-col col-xl-4">

### Analyze Performance 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

Nsight Systems offers low-overheard performance analysis that visualizes otherwise hidden layers of events and metrics used for pursuing optimizations, including CPU parallelization and core utilization, GPU streaming-multiprocessor (SM) optimization, system workload and CUDA® libraries trace, network communications, OS interactions, and more.  

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

</div>

<div id="ira23" class="col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12 grid-col col-xl-4">

### Scale Across Platforms 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

Nsight Systems is the universal tool for developing applications on NVIDIA platforms, whether on-premises or in the cloud. Scale across a wide range of NVIDIA platforms, from <a href="https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/dgx-platform/" id="itbvdr" target="_blank">NVIDIA DGX™</a> to <a href="https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/design-visualization/workstations/" id="i9okhh" target="_blank">NVIDIA RTX™ workstations</a>, including <a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/drive" id="i8qrf7" target="_blank">NVIDIA DRIVE®</a> for automotive and <a href="https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/autonomous-machines/embedded-systems/" id="idcuf1" target="_blank">NVIDIA Jetson™</a> for edge AI and robotics. Nsight Systems provide valuable insights for optimizing AI, high-performance computing (HPC), pro-visualization and gaming applications.   

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="iddsnm">

<div class="row">

</div>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div class="section page__section pt-0 pb-0">

## Explore Key Features  

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Trace CPU and GPU Workloads 

Nsight Systems latches on to target applications with low-overhead to expose CPU and GPU activity in timeline, correlating events to remedy performance blockers. For compute tasks, it supports investigating CUDA, cuBLAS, cuDNN, and NVIDIA TensorRT™. For graphics, it profiles Vulkan, OpenGL, DirectX 11, DirectX 12, DXR, and NVIDIA OptiX™ APIs.  

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/visualize-cpu-gpu-interactions-630x354.jpg" id="i3b9hw" alt="Nsight Systems can make high-performance games with beautiful graphics" />

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*CPU activity (top) in parallel to GPU graphics and compute activity (bottom).  *

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 product-page">

</div>

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/track-gpu-activity-630x354.jpg" id="ii8mbw" alt="Nsight Systems tracks GPU activity" />

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*The GPU Metrics section of the Nsight Systems timeline.  *

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Track GPU Activity 

To further explore the GPU, toggling on GPU Metrics Sampling will plot low-level input/output (IO) activity such as PCIe throughput, <a href="https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/nvlink/" id="i9wh9r" target="_blank">NVIDIA NVLink®</a>, and dynamic random-access memory (DRAM) activity. GPU Metrics Sampling also exposes SM utilization, Tensor Core activity, instruction throughput, and warp occupancy. Every workload and their CPU origin can be readily tracked to support performance tuning.   

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 product-page">

<div class="separator tablet-45 product-page">

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 product-page">

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Accelerate Multi-Node Performance 

Nsight Systems supports multi-node profiling to resolve performance limiters on the scale of data centers and clusters. <a href="https://docs.nvidia.com/nsight-systems/UserGuide/index.html#multi-report-analysis" id="iac1qg" target="_blank">Multi-node analysis</a> automatically diagnoses performance limiters across many nodes simultaneously. Additionally, network metrics alongside Python backtrace sampling paint a complete picture across GPUs, CPUs, DPUs, and internode communication.  
  

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*Scale AI Applications to the Data Center and Cloud with NVIDIA Nsight Systems GTC Demo Video  *

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 product-page">

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*Feature Spotlight on Python support in Nsight Developer Tools  *

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Optimize Python for AI and Deep Learning 

Nsight Systems helps you write Python applications that maximize GPU utilization. Backtraces and automatic call stack sampling allows you to fine-tune performance for deep learning applications.   
  
Furthermore, integration with Jupyter Lab allows you to profile Python and other supported languages directly in Jupyter, including detailed analysis with the full Nsight Systems GUI.   
  

<a href="https://pypi.org/project/jupyterlab-nvidia-nsight/" class="link-cta text-transform-unset fw-bold" target="_blank">Get the NVIDIA Nsight Tools JupyterLab Extension<em></em></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Bring your own data to Nsight Systems via Plugins 

Nsight Systems supports standalone executables and injected shared libraries as plugins. Alternatively, a plugin may simply specify a set of environment variables that are passed to the profiled application overriding any inherited ones. Standalone plugins can be profiled along with the main application or without one in a system-wide profiling. In-process plugins are loaded into a profiled process and initialized. The NVTX events emitted by a plugin are displayed in the same timeline as the main application events. Additionally, any stdout and stderr streams are captured 

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<img src="data:image/png;base64," id="i4cnqh3" alt="Nsight Systems accelerates multi-node performance" />

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*IBM Storage Scale or General Parallel File System(GPFS) metrics brought into Nsight Systems using a Plugin  *

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

<img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/detect-frame-stutter-and-bottlenecks-630x354.jpg" id="i4cnqh3-2" alt="Nsight Systems detects frame stutter and bottlenecks" />

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

*Nsight Systems detected a low-health frame resulting in a large stutter, as well as the calls that caused it.   *

</div>

<div class="col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-6">

### Detect Frame Stutter and Bottlenecks 

Nsight Systems automatically detects slow frames (by highlighting frame times higher than a target) as well as local stutter frames (by highlighting frames with higher times than neighboring frames). It also automatically reports CPU times per frame and API calls that are likely candidates for causing stutters. This equips developers with plenty of information to locate and resolve the causes of frame drops and inconsistent frame timing.  
  

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/using-nsight-systems-for-fixing-stutters-in-games/" class="link-cta text-transform-unset fw-bold" target="_blank">Read more about using Nsight Systems to fix stutters in games<em></em></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--60">

</div>

<div class="custom-html-wrapper">

<div class="custom-html-wrapper__code">

<div>

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-systems/get-started#feat-table" class="btn btn-cta btn-cta--light" target="_blank" style="margin-left:12px;margin-right:30px;">View Full Feature List</a> <a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-systems/get-started" class="btn btn-cta" style="margin-right:12px;">Get Started</a>

</div>

</div>

<div react-class="CustomHtml" react-props="{&quot;preview&quot;:false}">

</div>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div class="section page__section pt-0 pb-0">

## View Other Tools Within the Nsight Suite 

<div class="separator tablet-45 separator--15">

</div>

Nsight Systems is part of the NVIDIA Nsight Developer Tools suite, a collection of powerful tools, libraries, and SDKs that enable developers to build, debug, and profile software utilizing the latest accelerated computing hardware.  
  

<div class="row cards__list">

<div class="col-xl-4 col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12">

<div class="card-wrapper">

<div class="card">

<div class="card--content">

<div class="card--text">

<div class="container">

<div class="row">

<div class="col-xl-3 col-md-12 col-sm-4 col-4">

</div>

<div class="col-xl-6 col-md-12 col-sm-4 col-4">

<img src="https://developer.download.nvidia.com/images/nvidia-nsight-graphics-icon-gbp-shaded-128.png" id="if01r4-3" alt="img-alt-text" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

### Nsight Graphics 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

NVIDIA Nsight Graphics is a standalone developer tool with ray-tracing support that enables you to debug, profile, and export frames built with Direct3D, Vulkan, OpenGL, OpenVR, and the Oculus SDK.  

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

<div class="card--cta">

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-graphics" class="link-cta text-transform-unset fw-bold" target="_blank">Get Started<em></em></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="col-xl-4 col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12">

<div class="card-wrapper">

<div class="card">

<div class="card--content">

<div class="container">

<div class="row">

<div class="col-xl-3 col-md-12 col-sm-4 col-4">

</div>

<div class="col-xl-6 col-md-12 col-sm-4 col-4">

<img src="https://developer.download.nvidia.com/images/nvidia-nsight-compute-icon-gbp-shaded-128.png" id="if01r4-3-3" alt="img-alt-text" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

<div class="card--text">

### Nsight Compute 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

Nsight Compute is an interactive kernel profiler for CUDA applications. It provides detailed performance metrics and API debugging via a user interface and command-line tool. It also provides a customizable, data-driven user interface and metric collection that can be extended with analysis scripts for post-processing results..  

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

<div class="card--cta">

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-compute" class="link-cta text-transform-unset fw-bold" target="_blank">Get Started<em></em></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="col-xl-4 col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12">

<div class="card-wrapper">

<div class="card">

<div class="card--content">

<div class="card--text">

<div class="container">

<div class="row">

<div class="col-xl-3 col-md-12 col-sm-4 col-4">

</div>

<div class="col-sm-4 col-4 col-xl-6 col-md-3 col-lg-12">

<img src="https://developer.download.nvidia.com/images/nvidia-nsight-aftermath-icon.png" id="if01r4" alt="img-alt-text" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

### Nsight Aftermath SDK 

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

Nsigh Aftermath SDK is a library that integrates into a D3D12 or Vulkan game’s crash reporter to generate GPU “mini-dumps” when an exception or TDR occurs, exposing pipeline information to resolve an unexpected crash.  

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

</div>

<div class="card--cta">

<a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-aftermath" class="link-cta text-transform-unset fw-bold" target="_blank">Get Started<em></em></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

<div class="custom-html-wrapper">

<div class="custom-html-wrapper__code">

<div>

<a href="http://developer.nvidia.com/nsight-developer-tools" class="btn btn-cta btn-cta--light" style="margin-left:12px;margin-right:30px;">Browse Tutorials</a> <a href="https://developer.nvidia.com/tools-overview" class="btn btn-cta" style="margin-right:12px;margin-right:30px;">Learn More About Nsight Tools</a>

</div>

</div>

<div react-class="CustomHtml" react-props="{&quot;preview&quot;:false}">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="section page__section pt-0 pb-0">

## Check out partner testimonials and ecosystem 

<div id="iow33v" class="quotes-list-outer pb-0 pt-0 bg-white">

<div class="quotes-list-viewport mb-0">

<div class="quotes-list pb-0 pt-0">

> <div class="quote__text">
>
> Vulkan is the cornerstone of Adobe’s multi-platform, multi-vendor rendering strategy for its Adobe Substance 3D products. Thanks to the ray-tracing extensions that NVIDIA pioneered and contributed to Khronos, Vulkan gives native access to ray-tracing hardware, offering exceptional ray-tracing performance on supported devices. In addition, Nsight Graphics and Nsight Systems are invaluable tools when it comes to understanding and improving the performance of Vulkan ray-tracing applications.  
>
> — Francois Beaune, Lead Software Engineer of Photorealistic Rendering, Adobe 3D and Immersive  
>
> </div>
>
> <div class="quote__author">
>
> <div class="container">
>
> <div class="row">
>
> <div class="col-xl-4 col-sm-4 col-3">
>
> </div>
>
> <div class="col col-xl-4 col-sm-4 col-6">
>
> <img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/logo-adobe.svg" id="ib9b0dg" />
>
> </div>
>
> </div>
>
> </div>
>
> </div>

> <div class="quote__text">
>
> NVIDIA Nsight Systems has enabled the Microsoft Azure HPC+AI team to perform detailed analysis and optimize GPU-accelerated AI and software for our services and customers. The tool paints a clear picture of events on the CPUs, GPUs, NICs, and OS, which have allowed us to quickly identify the top time-consuming functions and cold spots to target.  
>
> — Kushal Datta, Principal Software Engineer, Microsoft Azure HPC+AI  
>
> </div>
>
> <div class="quote__author">
>
> <div class="container">
>
> <div class="row">
>
> <div class="col-xl-4 col-sm-4 col-3">
>
> </div>
>
> <div class="col-xl-4 col-sm-4 col-6">
>
> <img src="https://d29g4g2dyqv443.cloudfront.net/sites/default/files/akamai/logo-microsoft.svg" id="ixblpx" />
>
> </div>
>
> </div>
>
> </div>
>
> </div>

> <div class="quote__text">
>
> We noticed that our new Quadro P6000 server was ‘starved’ during training, and we needed experts to support us. NVIDIA Nsight Systems helped us to achieve over 90% GPU utilization. A deep learning model that previously took 600 minutes to train now takes only 90.  
>
> — Felix Goldberg, Chief AI Scientist, Tracxpoint  
>
> </div>
>
> <div class="quote__author">
>
> </div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="separator separator--30">

</div>

## Watch Nsight Developer Tools CUDA Tutorials 

CUDA Developer Tools is a series of tutorial videos designed to get you started with using Nsight tools for CUDA development. It explores key features for CUDA profiling, debugging, and optimizing.   

<div class="separator separator--15">

</div>

<div class="row">

<div class="col-lg-4 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xl-4">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

## Stay up to Date on the Latest NVIDIA Nsight Systems News 

<div class="separator product-page">
